overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a magical school, featuring floating candles, towering stained glass windows, and students dining at long house tables. Warm afternoon sunlight streams through the windows, illuminating the stone architecture and creating an atmospheric, historic ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: standing in the great hall, slowly panning gaze across the dining students and gothic architecture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating and conversing at the nearest house table
group of students seated along the left side table, engaged in meal

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass windows with intricate designs casting colored light onto the stone floor
hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air throughout the hall providing warm illumination
long wooden house tables laden with food, plates, and dining ware stretching across the hall
high vaulted stone ceiling with ornate gothic arches and structural beams
massive stone pillars supporting the ceiling structure along the right side of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans across a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in warm sunlight streaming through towering stained glass windows. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space above long wooden house tables where students in dark robes are seated eating and conversing. The stone architecture features high vaulted ceilings and massive pillars, creating an atmosphere of historic grandeur typical of a magical school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a magnificent gothic dining hall that emphasizes the scale and warmth of a magical school's interior. It begins by capturing the glow of warm sunlight streaming through towering stained glass windows, which casts a golden light over the stone architecture. As the camera moves, the view expands to reveal hundreds of floating candles drifting beneath high vaulted ceilings and massive pillars. The movement finally settles on the long wooden house tables where students in dark robes are seated, eating and conversing within the historic grandeur of the space.
